title: Police Station Cover for Criminal Defence Firms | Free Directory & WhatsApp Job Group UK

headings.text: Police Station Cover for Firms & Solicitors
Are You a Rep? Join the Network
Need a Police Station Rep in Kent?

content: HomePolice Station CoverCriminal Defence Firms & Solicitors OnlyPolice Station Cover for Firms & SolicitorsFind accredited representatives or post cover jobs directly — England & WalesIMPORTANT NOTICEThis page is intended for criminal defence firms and solicitors only. We do not accept instructions from members of the public and do not provide legal advice to detainees or families.policestationrepuk.com provides access to a national network of accredited police station representatives available to assist criminal defence firms with police station cover on a firm-to-firm basis.The platform exists to support solicitors who require reliable attendance support due to sickness, holiday, distance, workload, or out-of-hours arrests.Browse the Rep DirectorySearch by area, station or county to find accredited representatives available for cover work.Search DirectoryJoin Our WhatsApp Job GroupPost cover jobs directly to accredited representatives. Verified firms only.Request Access BelowWhat Is Police Station Cover?Police station cover refers to professional attendance at a police station on behalf of an instructing firm where the firm is unable to attend personally. This is operational support between professionals and does not involve public referral or client acquisition.Common scenarios include:•Sudden illness or unexpected absence•Planned leave or rota gaps•Overnight or weekend arrests•Multiple detainees requiring simultaneous attendance•Geographic distance making attendance impractical•Overflow work during busy periodsAll instructions remain with the instructing firm.Who This Service Is ForCriminal defence firmsSole practitionersDuty solicitors requiring overflow or ad-hoc supportFirms seeking reliable police station attendance arrangementsIt is not a public-facing legal service and is not intended for individuals seeking representation.WhatsApp Job Group for FirmsPost police station cover jobs directly to accredited representativesA private WhatsApp group for criminal defence firms to post police station cover jobsAccess limited to verified criminal defence firms onlyMonitored by a practising solicitor to ensure professional standardsConnects firms directly with accredited representatives for urgent and planned coverTo request access, please text the following details to:07535 494446Required Information:Full name (of the person requesting access)Firm nameFirm email addressText 07535 494446 to Request AccessWhat Happens Next1Your details are checkedWe verify that the request is from a genuine criminal defence firm2You may be contacted if clarification is neededWe may follow up to confirm firm detailsOnce verified, you are added to the WhatsApp groupYou'll receive a WhatsApp invitation to joinAlternative ContactIf you are unable to text, please email the same details to robertcashman@defencelegalservices.co.ukThe Police Station Rep Networkpolicestationrepuk.com hosts a directory of police station representatives who:•Hold current PACE accreditation•Have experience attending police interviews•Specify the counties and stations they cover•Indicate availability for daytime, overnight, or weekend work•Operate on a firm-to-firm professional basisCoverage Across England & WalesThe network includes representatives covering a wide range of custody suites across England and Wales. Availability varies by location and time. Firms are responsible for agreeing terms, fees, and instructions directly with the representative.Are You a Rep? Join the NetworkAccredited police station representatives may apply to join the directory. Inclusion is subject to verification. Register as a RepCustody Note — The custody note app for freelance repsStructured notes with LAA code support, firm billing, PACE reviews, and PDF export. Works offline.🎁 PSR UK exclusive: 25% off with code A2MJY2NQTry Free Advertisement · custodynote.comOperated by Robert Cashman, Duty Solicitor & Higher Rights AdvocateFinal NoticeThis website:—Does not provide legal advice to the public—Does not accept direct client instructions—Is intended solely for professional use by criminal defence firms and accredited representativesThe WhatsApp group facilitates introductions only. Instruction, supervision, and payment remain the responsibility of the instructing firm.
